description: Metadata record for a scroll on Aris Press. The record points at the canonical Press URL; the scroll content itself remains on Press's content-addressable storage. urlHash + contentHash anchor the record to a specific immutable artifact.

authors.description: Ordered list of authors. v1: display name only; ORCID and DID will appear once Press resolves per-author identifiers.

abstract.description: Abstract as plain text. Included in the record so discovery surfaces can render decision context without a click-through.

canonicalUrl.description: Canonical Press URL. This is the artifact location; the record is a pointer, not a replacement.

urlHash.description: Press's short content-addressable identifier. Used as the atproto record key (rkey) so republish is idempotent.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical scroll content. Lets downstream consumers verify the record points at the artifact it claims to point at.

publishedAt.description: When the scroll was published on Press.

doi.description: DOI assigned by Zenodo, if minted.

version.description: Version number within a scroll series. Each version is its own atproto record with its own rkey.

arch.description: ARCH spec version the scroll conforms to (https://aris.pub/arch/). Substrate-trust signal distinguishing Press scrolls from text preprints.

format.description: Artifact format. interactive_html signals that the scroll is a rich HTML document with progressive-enhancement JavaScript, not a static PDF.
